title: Best Hospital Pediatrician, Replacement Surgeon, Orthopedic Centre in South Delhi
heading: Core Specialties
description: Triton hospital is a multispeciality hospital in South Delhi having expertise in providing best class pediatrician, knee replacement, joint replacement, orthopedic, mother and child care and various healthcare services. It has top-rated Pediatric Surgeon & Doctors in India.
text: Best Hospital Pediatrician, Replacement Surgeon, Orthopedic Centre in South Delhi In light of COVID-19, we are trying our best to offer the medical services & support to our patients. With the objective of maintaining social distancing, avoiding avoidable visits and overcrowding in the OPD's, we have started various platforms in the form of strict appointment system, telemedicine and sms consults for you to connect to our experts. contact@tritonhospital.com +91-11-46056464 Services available 24x7 | Book Appointment Home About Triton Hospital Mission & Vision Infrastructure & Facilities Management Core specialties Advanced Gynae & Birthing Center Advanced Neonatal and Paediatric Center(with level III NICU/PICU) Advanced Laparoscopic Surgical Center Advanced Orthopedic Center(fracture/joint replacement/spine surgery) Advanced Center for Physiotherapy and Rehabilitation Advanced Center for Diabetes/Thyroid/Hypertension/Dialysis Other Specialties Dermatology Dentistry Internal Medicine Lab and Radiology 24x7 Pharmacy 24x7 Urology Media & Events Gallery Testimonials Health Information contact Core Specialties Adult Specialties Advanced Orthopedic Center (Fracture/Joint Replacement/Spine Surgery) Advanced Laparoscopic Surgical Center Advanced Center for Physiotherapy & Rehabilitation Advanced Center for Diabetes/Thyroid/ Hypertension/Dialysis Woman And Child Specialties Advanced Gynae & Birthing Center Advanced Neonatal & Paediatric Center (with level III NICU/PICU) Paediatric Orthopedics Paediatric And Neonatal Surgery Paediatric Endocrinology Paediatric Neurology Dentistry Dermatology About Triton Hospital Triton Hospital is set up as a twin tower hospital comprising of 8 floors over a carpet area of approx of 24000 sqft with a potential bed strength of upto 80 beds. It is  an endeavor  to make the maternity, neo-paediatric intensive care services  and superspecialty surgery services available not only for the Indian affluent and international patients but also for the not so affordable families. ln the first phase, the hospital has opened up to the people of Delhi, its OPD and IPD services with 50 beds along with a 12 bedded level Ill NICU, 4 bedded post op and paediatric ICU, 2 Modular operation theatres with C Arm machine and laparoscopic equipment, labour cum delivery room, 24x7 pharmacy, pathology, radiology and other diagnostic services. All hospital beds(ICU and non ICU) have centralized oxygen and vacuum points.
